scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.db:start: docker start cae-postgres || docker run -d --name cae-postgres -e POSTGRES_USER=cae -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=cae_password -e POSTGRES_DB=cae -p 5433:5432 postgres:16-alpine
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run db:start && pnpm run db:push && pnpm --dir backend dev
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir backend typecheck && pnpm --dir frontend typecheck
